summary: Selected Kenney Blaster Kit 2.1 as the first CC0 external weapon source for three test-level guns.
observations: Official Kenney source lists Blaster Kit 2.1 as Creative Commons CC0.
The kit includes GLB models and preview images suitable for a quick first-person weapon selector.
Only blaster-a, blaster-h, and blaster-p were imported for the first payload.
decisions: Use Kenney Blaster Kit 2.1 for the first weapon slice.
Defer larger gun-pack imports until a level-specific roster needs them.
Keep the external-source gate CC0-only for this early mobile prototype.
caughtIssues: No enemy or environment asset brief exists yet, so weapon selection stayed generic sci-fi.
risks: The stylized sci-fi look may need art-direction review once the first level theme is set.
